'''mobasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iligant|iligant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iligant|iligant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mobasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mobasithi|mobasithi]] || [[word:mobasiji|mobasiji]] || [[word:mobasishi|mobasishi]] || [[word:mobasiki|mobasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mobasuthuthu|mobasuthuthu]] || [[word:mobasujuju|mobasujuju]] || [[word:mobasushushu|mobasushushu]] || [[word:mobasukuku|mobasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mobasuthu|mobasuthu]] || [[word:mobasuju|mobasuju]] || [[word:mobasushu|mobasushu]] || [[word:mobasuku|mobasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mobasufthuf|mobasufthuf]] || [[word:mobasufjuf|mobasufjuf]] || [[word:mobasufshuf|mobasufshuf]] || [[word:mobasufkuf|mobasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mobasethe|mobasethe]] || [[word:mobaseje|mobaseje]] || [[word:mobaseshe|mobaseshe]] || [[word:mobaseke|mobaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mobasothotho|mobasothotho]] || [[word:mobasojojo|mobasojojo]] || [[word:mobasoshosho|mobasoshosho]] || [[word:mobasokoko|mobasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mobasotho|mobasotho]] || [[word:mobasojo|mobasojo]] || [[word:mobasosho|mobasosho]] || [[word:mobasoko|mobasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mobasofthof|mobasofthof]] || [[word:mobasofjof|mobasofjof]] || [[word:mobasofshof|mobasofshof]] || [[word:mobasofkof|mobasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfthÃŸf|mobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfjÃŸf|mobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfshÃŸf|mobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfkÃŸf|mobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mobasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mobasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mobasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mobasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfthÃŸf|mobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfjÃŸf|mobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfshÃŸf|mobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfkÃŸf|mobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfthÃŸf|mobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfjÃŸf|mobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfshÃŸf|mobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mobasÃŸfkÃŸf|mobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mobasÃḊthÃḊ|mobasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mobasÃḊjÃḊ|mobasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mobasÃḊshÃḊ|mobasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mobasÃḊkÃḊ|mobasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mobasathatha|mobasathatha]] || [[word:mobasajaja|mobasajaja]] || [[word:mobasashasha|mobasashasha]] || [[word:mobasakaka|mobasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mobasatha|mobasatha]] || [[word:mobasaja|mobasaja]] || [[word:mobasasha|mobasasha]] || [[word:mobasaka|mobasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mobasafthaf|mobasafthaf]] || [[word:mobasafjaf|mobasafjaf]] || [[word:mobasafshaf|mobasafshaf]] || [[word:mobasafkaf|mobasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mobasasha|mobasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mobasshÃḋasha|mobasshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mobasroasha|mobasroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mobasmuasha|mobasmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mobasyaasha|mobasyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomobasnkshÃḋasha|gomobasnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomobasnkroasha|gomobasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomobasnkmuasha|gomobasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomobasnkyaasha|gomobasnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mobabasasha|mobabasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mobabasshÃḋasha|mobabasshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mobabasroasha|mobabasroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mobabasmuasha|mobabasmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mobabasyaasha|mobabasyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomobabasnkshÃḋasha|gomobabasnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomobabasnkroasha|gomobabasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomobabasnkmuasha|gomobabasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomobabasnkyaasha|gomobabasnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mebÃḊsasha|mebÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mebÃḊsshÃḋasha|mebÃḊsshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mebÃḊsroasha|mebÃḊsroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mebÃḊsmuasha|mebÃḊsmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mebÃḊsyaasha|mebÃḊsyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomebÃḊsnkshÃḋasha|gomebÃḊsnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomebÃḊsnkroasha|gomebÃḊsnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomebÃḊsnkmuasha|gomebÃḊsnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomebÃḊsnkyaasha|gomebÃḊsnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mobfasasha|mobfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mobfasshÃḋasha|mobfasshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mobfasroasha|mobfasroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mobfasmuasha|mobfasmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mobfasyaasha|mobfasyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomobfasnkshÃḋasha|gomobfasnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomobfasnkroasha|gomobfasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomobfasnkmuasha|gomobfasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomobfasnkyaasha|gomobfasnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
